chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 222 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.5366/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.5367/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.5368/2025 (R/Surety) 30.09.2025 1. Though no one is present for the applicant, but as the matter pertains to the return of surety only, urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by applicant Sanaullah Noonari seeking return of surety documents. As per its contents, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Altaf Hussain Noonari was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 20.05.2022 subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing two original special savings certificates of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed by this Court vide order dated 14.11.2022. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the judgment dated 12.08.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
